kapaAi.disclaimer.message: This **AI assistant answers WordPress Playground questions** using the [documentation](https://wordpress.github.io/wordpress-playground/) and [github issues](https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-playground/issues) from last year

kapaAi.exampleQuestions.message: How to use Blueprints API?,How to change PHP version?,How to import a WXR file?,How to mount local files?
